generated_oml:
instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position encoder mounted on motor for measuring motor position"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorEncoderDataTransmitted
]

instance SecondaryEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position encoder behind gearbox for measuring gearbox output position"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SecondaryEncoderDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor measuring input current to permanent magnet synchronous motor"
    DTDFVocab:producedData InputCurrentDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorEncoderDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance SecondaryEncoderDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryEncoder
]

instance InputCurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
]

instance SiemensSINUMERIK840DslCNCController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller for precise axis control of robot first axis"
]

instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor providing torque output for robot first axis"
]

instance ContinuousIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous identification of joint friction using white-box and black-box models"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionIdentificationInsight
]

instance MotionAccuracyEnhancementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Motion accuracy enhancement through refined control algorithms"
    DTDFVocab:provides RefineControlAlgorithmsAction
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Integrated visualization of robot status and data in dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance FrictionIdentificationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Friction identification insights used to refine robot control algorithms for improved motion accuracy"
]

instance RefineControlAlgorithmsAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Refining robot control algorithms based on friction identification insights"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of robot data and status in dashboard"
]

instance SysMLEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML for structural and behavioral modeling of robot system"
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousIdentificationService, VisualizationService
]

instance SimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks MATLAB Simulink for friction model simulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousIdentificationService
]

instance AASEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells for digital twin data exchange"
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousIdentificationService, VisualizationService
]

instance MQTTEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time data streaming from sensors"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance DashboardEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard for visualizing robot data and insights"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance BlockDefinitionDiagram : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram for robot axis structural model"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]

instance InternalBlockDiagram : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagram for robot axis internal structure"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]

instance CoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Coulomb-Viscous friction model simulation in Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance StribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Stribeck friction model simulation in Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance DahlFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dahl friction model simulation in Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance LuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "LuGre friction model simulation in Simulink"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance AssetAdministrationShell : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell for robot digital twin data management"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo AASEnabler
]

instance MeasuredInputCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured input current data from motor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData InputCurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, DashboardEnabler
]

instance TorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Calculated torque from motor current and position data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData InputCurrentDataTransmitted, MotorEncoderDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, DashboardEnabler
]

instance AngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived angular velocity from motor encoder position data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler, DashboardEnabler
]

instance SimulatedOutputsData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated outputs from friction models for joint friction analysis"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderDataTransmitted, InputCurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkEnabler
]

instance RobotFirstAxis : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "First axis of the MABI MAX 100 industrial robot, including motor and two gearboxes (gearwheel and cycloidal gearbox)"
]

instance RobotEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains RobotFirstAxis, SiemensSINUMERIK840DslCNCController, PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor, MotorEncoder, SecondaryEncoder, MotorCurrentSensor
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "No data transmission from virtual to physical; digital shadow operates with one-way data flow only (physical to virtual), as per Kritzinger et al. [32]."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time data streaming via MQTT; no specific time rate specified."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Digital shadow integrating SysML structural models, Simulink friction models, AAS, live sensor data via MQTT, and unified dashboard for visualization and analysis."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "As operated phase; continuous monitoring and improvement during robot operation."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Validation through comparison of simulated data against reference measurements; multi-physics-aware identification to account for load, temperature, and wear effects."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for streaming sensor data from physical system to digital shadow."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell (AAS) and SysML standards used for modeling; specific standardization details not elaborated."
]
